description_long: This rickshaw features a sleek, metallic body with a deep brown and gold color scheme, giving it a luxurious and modern appearance. It has a rectangular roof supported by four slender pillars, providing shade and partial shelter for passengers. The vehicle is equipped with large, spoked wheels on either side, and a boxy front section that likely houses the driver's controls. The sides are open, allowing easy access and ventilation, while the interior appears to have a bench seat for passengers. Decorative elements, such as geometric hanging ornaments, add a touch of elegance to the design. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and possibly some synthetic materials for comfort and durability.
description: A stylish, open-sided rickshaw with a glossy brown and gold finish, large spoked wheels, and a rectangular roof supported by slender pillars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the boxy front section, narrow profile, and the supporting pillars of the roof.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open sides, large spoked wheels, bench seating, and decorative hanging ornaments under the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the bench seat, the supporting pillars, and the overall rectangular shape of the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the open side, wheels, and interior seating arrangement.
attribute_passenger_seating_arrangement: One rear-facing bench seat for 2-3 passengers, located behind the driver.
